prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别约12652名、5598名、4180名、9046名、4071名。2021年位次较高，2022–2023年大幅前移，2024年因吉林省首次新高考（物理类）出现波动后移至9046名，2025年迅速回升至4071名，近两年位次整体前移，竞争加剧。2025年基准位次约4071名；该校在吉林省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年93人、2022年93人、2023年94人、2024年96人、2025年88人、2026年86人。2026年较2025年缩招2人，缩幅约2.3%，小幅缩招对竞争影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第41位（2021年第40位、2025年第42位），近年排名稳定在40–43名区间，属于全国顶尖211院校，层次较高；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及实验室爆炸历史事件引发的校园安全关注；抖音热度排名第45位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录，整体报考心理较为平稳；第五轮学科评估中，系统科学A+、交通运输工程A、信息与通信工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、土木工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科。其中计算机类、电子信息/通信、交通运输等优势学科与当前社会高热专业方向高度契合。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与北交大优势学科方向一致，有利于吸引高分考生报考。吉林省2026年普通高考总人数约110868人，较2025年（111492人）略降约0.6%；按近年比例估算物理类约79800人，较2025年物理类80421人略降，考生规模基本稳定。；北京交通大学位于北京市，属于一线城市热门地域，对吉林省考生有较强吸引力；该校在吉林省招生占比相对稳定，无显著地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4071名、2026年小幅缩招2.3%、学校层次高、优势学科与高热专业方向高度契合、考生规模基本稳定等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅前移。预测最低位次约4001名，区间3601–4401名。

- 计算机类

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 12652, 5598, 4180, 9046, and 4071 respectively. The ranking was higher in 2021, significantly advanced in 2022–2023, fluctuated in 2024 due to Jilin's first new college entrance exam (Physics Category) moving back to 9046, and quickly recovered to 4071 in 2025. Overall rankings have advanced in recent two years, intensifying competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4071. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Jilin: 93 in 2021, 93 in 2022, 94 in 2023, 96 in 2024, 88 in 2025, and 86 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 2 students, a decrease of about 2.3%, which has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 41st in 2026 (40th in 2021, 42nd in 2025), stable in the 40–43 range in recent years, making it a top national 211 institution with a high level. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to campus safety concerns from historical laboratory explosion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 45th (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure. No significant record of admission cut-off fluctuations is observed, and overall application psychology is relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 6 disciplines rated A- or above: System Science A+, Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-. Among them, computer, electronic information/communication, and transportation are highly aligned with current socially hot majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, consistent with BJTU's advantageous disciplines, attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jilin general college entrance exam is approximately 110,868, slightly down by about 0.6% from 2025 (111,492). Based on recent proportions, Physics Category candidates are about 79,800, slightly down from 80,421 in 2025, with a basically stable candidate pool. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal to Jilin candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Jilin is relatively stable, with no significant regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4071, a slight enrollment reduction of 2.3% in 2026, high university level, strong alignment of advantageous disciplines with hot majors, and basically stable candidate pool, competition in 2026 is expected to slightly intensify compared to 2025, with rankings slightly advancing. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4001, with a range of 3601–4401.

Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class Information/Smart)
- Computer Science
- Electronic Information
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation (Smart Systems and Smart Manufacturing)
- Transportation
- Electrical Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Statistics/Smart Optoelectronics and Nanotechnology)
- Mechanical Engineering (Smart Manufacturing and Smart Equipment)
- Civil Engineering (Smart Construction and Smart Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3601–4401, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors (Zhan Tianyou Class, Computer Science, Electronic Information) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 3601), prioritize aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors. BJTU's advantageous disciplines (Transportation, Information and Communication, Computer) are highly aligned with current socially hot majors, and application enthusiasm is expected to remain high.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科/历史类最低位次分别约1013名、3639名、1318名、1156名、875名。2022年因文科批次合并等因素位次大幅后移至3639名，2023年迅速回升至1318名，2024–2025年持续前移，2025年基准位次约875名，近三年整体呈前移趋势；该校在吉林省文科/历史类招生计划：2021年9人、2022年9人、2023年10人、2024年10人、2025年10人、2026年7人。2026年较2025年缩招3人，缩幅达30%，缩招幅度较大，名额减少将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科排名第41位，虽以理工科见长，但211层次对文科考生仍有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（实验室安全事件），但主要涉及理工科领域，对文科报考影响有限；抖音热度排名第45位（较热），整体关注度中等偏上；管理科学与工程A-、系统科学A+等与文科试验班类（经济管理人才试点班）相关；法学专业虽无A类学科评估，但社会热度偏热。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度偏热（推荐），经济管理类分化观望。吉林省2026年普通高考总人数约110868人，按近年比例估算历史类约31000人，较2025年历史类31071人基本持平。；北京交通大学位于北京市，一线城市对文科考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在吉林省文科招生名额较少（2026年仅7人），稀缺性可能进一步推高竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次875名、2026年大幅缩招30%、名额稀缺性推高竞争、法学等文科专业热度偏热、考生规模基本稳定等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年加剧，位次前移但幅度受缩招效应制约。预测最低位次约768名，区间653–883名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1013, 3639, 1318, 1156, and 875 respectively. In 2022, due to factors such as the merger of liberal arts batches, the ranking significantly dropped to 3639, but quickly rebounded to 1318 in 2023. From 2024 to 2025, the ranking continued to move forward, with a baseline ranking of about 875 in 2025, showing an overall forward trend in the past three years. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Jilin Province: 9 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 10 in 2024, 10 in 2025, and 7 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the enrollment in 2026 will be reduced by 3 students, a decrease of 30%, which is a significant reduction. The decrease in slots will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 41st in the Soft Science ranking. Although it is strong in science and engineering, its 211 status still holds strong appeal for liberal arts students. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to a laboratory safety incident), but this mainly involves the science and engineering fields, with limited impact on liberal arts applications. Its Douyin popularity ranks 45th (relatively hot), with overall attention at a medium-high level. Management Science and Engineering is rated A-, Systems Science is A+, which are related to the Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Economic Management Talent Pilot Class). Although the Law major does not have an A-level discipline evaluation, its social popularity is relatively hot.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended), while economic management categories are in a wait-and-see state. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin Province general college entrance examination is approximately 110,868. Based on recent proportions, the history category is estimated to have about 31,000 candidates, roughly the same as the 31,071 in 2025. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal for liberal arts students. The university has very few liberal arts enrollment slots in Jilin Province (only 7 in 2026), and this scarcity may further drive up competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 875, the significant 30% enrollment reduction in 2026, the scarcity of slots driving up competition, the relatively hot popularity of liberal arts majors like Law, and the basically stable number of candidates, it is expected that competition in 2026 will intensify compared to 2025, with rankings moving forward but limited by the enrollment reduction effect. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 768, with a range of 653 to 883.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Economic Management Talent Pilot Class) (Business Administration, Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- No other liberal arts majors listed in the 2026 enrollment plan.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- None (only 2 liberal arts majors are offered, and Tier 1 already covers all).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 653 to 883, only Law and the Liberal Arts Experimental Class are available as liberal arts majors. It is recommended to prioritize Law as the main application direction, with the Liberal Arts Experimental Class as a backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 653), Law can be given priority. Since there are only 7 liberal arts enrollment slots, competition is fierce. Candidates are advised to carefully choose based on their interests and career plans.
